overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's neon-lit downtown streets at night. The character transitions from a covered commercial street through a narrow alley into an open plaza with market stalls and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered cyberpunk commercial street with neon signage

events.description: yellow taxi drives past on the right side of the street
pedestrian crosses quickly from left to right in front of the camera

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the covered neon-lit street, observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving along the street from left to right

entered.detail: tall futuristic building with illuminated windows and neon accents on the left side
tall futuristic building with large holographic displays on the right side
elevated walkway connecting buildings across the street with glowing signage underneath
large floating holographic advertisement displaying animated purple imagery
vertical neon signage with Asian characters and bright colors

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a covered cyberpunk street lined with towering futuristic buildings and bright neon signage. A yellow taxi passes by on the right while the wet pavement reflects the colorful lights from the holographic billboards overhead.

events.description: slight path adjustment while continuing forward along the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street, approaching a left turn into a narrow passage

entered.detail: yellow and black striped construction barriers lining the left sidewalk
red and white striped plastic barricades near the construction zone

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking down the covered street, passing construction barriers on the left. The overhead pedestrian bridge looms closer as the character approaches a turn, with the sushi holographic billboard now more prominent ahead.

events.description: turning left from main street into narrow alleyway between buildings
moving from neon-lit street into darker alley then approaching bright plaza exit

agents.ego_description: turning left into a narrow passage between buildings, heading toward the lit exit

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking ahead in the alley toward the plaza

entered.detail: smooth dark metal wall of the building forming the left side of the narrow passage
concrete and metal wall of the building forming the right side of the alley
yellow-roofed market stall visible at the end of the alley in the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a narrow, dimly lit alleyway between tall buildings. The neon lights of the main street fade behind as the character approaches a bright opening ahead where a yellow market stall and open plaza are visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with market stalls and neon advertisements

events.description: exiting narrow alley into open plaza with market stalls and palm trees
encountering seated pedestrians and market vendors in the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza, passing various market stalls and seated NPCs

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the ground near a yellow market stall

entered.detail: wide open pedestrian area with wet reflective pavement and scattered palm trees
large distinctive red diagonal structural beam crossing the plaza
multiple large holographic advertisements on surrounding building walls
tall palm trees scattered throughout the plaza area
large industrial air conditioning units mounted on the right building facade

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow alley into a spacious open plaza illuminated by holographic billboards and neon lights. The area features yellow market stalls, a distinctive red diagonal support beam, and scattered pedestrians including someone sitting near a stall on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza interior with covered walkways and food stalls

events.description: slight turn to navigate around plaza structures and stalls

agents.ego_description: continuing through the plaza past various food stalls and architectural structures

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with distinctive blue hair standing near a food stall

entered.detail: modern covered walkway structure with illuminated roof panels spanning across the plaza
food stall with bright citrus-themed signage and blue counter
futuristic white bench structures for pedestrian seating

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking deeper into the plaza, passing under a covered walkway structure and by various food stalls including one with a citrus sign. A pedestrian with blue hair stands near a stall on the left as the character moves through the open area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a crowded, neon-lit commercial thoroughfare through a secluded alleyway and into a vibrant open-air plaza. It begins on a covered cyberpunk street where a yellow taxi glides past wet pavement reflecting towering holographic billboards. As the character passes construction barriers and moves toward a prominent sushi hologram, the camera follows a left turn into a narrow, dimly lit alleyway that momentarily obscures the city's glow. The scene then opens as the character emerges from the shadows into a spacious plaza illuminated by bright neon lights, featuring yellow market stalls and a distinctive red diagonal support beam. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the plaza, passing under a covered walkway and by various food stalls and pedestrians until the environment fully expands into the bustling market hub.
